name: Linux Doas Tool Execution
notes:
This rule detects Linux doas tool execution.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Sittikorn S, Teoderick Contreras
SIGMA Title: Linux Doas Tool Execution
SIGMA Description: Detects the doas tool execution in linux host platform. This utility tool allow standard users to perform tasks as root, the same way sudo does.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%doas' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Linux Doas Tool Execution on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%doas' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Linux Doas Tool Execution
Event description: Detects Linux doas tool execution.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
